apps.label: DOPE projected-feed Colorama build
apps.notes: Bundled public DOPE projected-feed Colorama APK. The Windows companion treats this bundle as the approved install and launch target, and the current multilayer runtime consumes the bundled hotload CSV profiles with startup diagnostics readback. Live quest_twin_* transport remains a separate bridge lane.

apps.label: Rusty DOPE Colorama feedback-border build
apps.notes: Rust/Makepad OpenXR build from Rusty-DOPE. Companion install and launch are supported with Rust-specific Quest permissions and debug.rustydope startup properties; Unity hotload CSVs, live variable setters, twin readback, and focused/media streaming controls are not wired for this target yet.
